description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single "prepare" stage that runs security scanners. Add a gemnasium-dependency_scanning job that uses the Dependency-Scanning template, has no needs, and runs when go.mod changes in a merge request, on the default branch, on tags, on branches matching /^[\d-]+-stable(-ee)?$/ or /^security\//. Add a gitlab-advanced-sast job using the SAST template with the same rules and no needs. Add a secret_detection job using the Secret-Detection template that only runs on merge requests. Add a semgrep-sast job using the SAST template, also with no needs, the same rules, and a variable SAST_EXCLUDED_PATHS set to the default paths plus **/*.py, **/*.go, **/*.java, **/*.js, **/*.jsx, **/*.ts, **/*.tsx, **/*.cjs, **/*.mjs, **/*.cs. Set variables GITLAB_ADVANCED_SAST_ENABLED='true' and SAST_EXCLUDED_ANALYZERS='brakeman,eslint,gosec', and include the Jobs/SAST, Jobs/Dependency-Scanning, and Jobs/Secret-Detection templates.
